name: VitaReports
description: All VitaReports APIs. Suggested order: create-profile → update-manual-entry → extract-lab-reports / ingest-wearable-export → GET profile → health-snapshot GETs. Select Local env (baseUrl, patientId). For multipart requests, attach files from reassignmentcheckin/.

body.raw:
{

requests.name: GET /profile/{patientId}
requests.docs: Profile plus manual entries. Run after create-profile / update-manual-entry.

requests.name: POST /create-lab-report (cbc)
requests.docs: Manual typed CBC create (no file upload).
